summary: Viral Optimization Sprint testing completed. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests passed - MySpacePage shows Momentum Meter badge ('Spreading Widely'), Reshare Nudge, Milestone Celebration with Share button, and Milestone Badges. PublicCreation page shows 'Create Your Version' header with 'Inspired stories spread faster' helper text.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/viral/momentum-meter correctly returns stories with momentum levels (rising_fast, trending, spreading_widely)
GET /api/viral/my-nudges correctly returns pending nudges for current user with copy_variant_id
POST /api/viral/generate-nudges respects 24h cap - second call returns 0 nudges
POST /api/viral/dismiss-nudge correctly dismisses all user nudges
No Phase C hidden data leaks in public viral endpoints (chain-stats, milestones, rewards/status)
MySpacePage Momentum Meter badge shows 'Spreading Widely' on viral chain timeline
MySpacePage Reshare Nudge shows 'Your story got 3 new remixes since you shared — share again to keep momentum'
MySpacePage Milestone Celebration card shows 'First Viral Remix' with 'Share Milestone' button
MySpacePage Milestone badges have hover effect and animation (transition-all hover:bg-amber-500/15 hover:scale-[1.02])
PublicCreation Remix section header says 'Create Your Version' with helper text 'Inspired stories spread faster — make this one yours'
SharePromptModal Share Again section shows momentum copy with remix count and 'Share Again to Keep Momentum' button
seed_data_creation: None - test user has existing viral chain data ('The Friendly Limit' with 3 remixes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Viral Optimization Sprint features are fully functional. Test user has viral chain data showing 'Spreading Widely' momentum. MySpacePage shows all viral elements: Momentum Meter badge, Reshare Nudge, Milestone Celebration, Milestone Badges. PublicCreation page shows 'Create Your Version' with 'Inspired stories spread faster' helper. SharePromptModal has Share Again section with momentum copy. All nudge endpoints respect 24h caps and have copy_variant_id for A/B tracking.

backend: GET /api/viral/momentum-meter - returns stories with momentum levels (rising_fast, trending, spreading_widely) ✓
GET /api/viral/my-nudges - returns pending nudges for current user ✓
POST /api/viral/generate-nudges - creates reshare + progress nudges respecting 24h caps ✓
Security: No Phase C hidden data leaks in chain-stats ✓
Security: No Phase C hidden data leaks in milestones ✓
Security: No Phase C hidden data leaks in rewards/status ✓
All nudges have copy_variant_id for A/B tracking ✓

MySpacePage: Milestone Celebration card appears with 'Share Milestone' button ✓
MySpacePage: Milestone badges have hover effect and animation ✓

PublicCreation: Helper text says 'Inspired stories spread faster — make this one yours' ✓
PublicCreation: Remix variant buttons (Comic Book, GIF, Reel, Bedtime) ✓
